instruction: Could you help me unzip the downloaded extension file from /home/user/Desktop/ to /home/user/Desktop/ and configure it in Chrome's extensions?
config: _execute_setup(command='echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S apt-get update -y && echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S apt-get install unzip -y && unzip /home/user/Desktop/helloExtension.zip -d /home/user/Desktop/ && rm /home/user/Desktop/helloExtension.zip', shell=True)
